name: Connect Meta Business Assets
description: Guide user through generating a System User access token in Meta Business Suite.

steps.instruction: Make sure you are on Meta Business Suite.
steps.fallback: Go to business.facebook.com and log in with your business account.

steps.instruction: Click the Settings icon in the left sidebar.
steps.fallback: Look for a Settings or gear icon in the left navigation bar.

steps.instruction: In the left sidebar, click Users then System Users.
steps.fallback: Under Users in the left sidebar, click System Users.

steps.instruction: Click Add to create a new system user.
steps.fallback: Click the Add button to create a system user, or select your existing one.

steps.instruction: Click Generate New Token on the system user.
steps.fallback: Select your system user then click Generate New Token.

steps.instruction: Copy the token. Never share it — paste it only in your dashboard.
steps.fallback: Click Copy next to the access token, then switch to your dashboard.

steps.instruction: Paste the token in the field shown in your dashboard.
steps.fallback: Switch to your Briolo dashboard tab and paste the token in the input shown.
